raw_transcript: We treat it with a very specific antibiotic called Rifaximin. Unlike other antibiotics, it isn't absorbed into your bloodstream; it stays in the small intestine to kill the local overgrowth. We'll also discuss a 'low-fermentation' diet to keep the bacteria from coming back.
final_corrected_note: We treat it with a very specific antibiotic called Rifaximin. Unlike other antibiotics, it isn't absorbed into your bloodstream; it stays in the small intestine to kill the local overgrowth. We'll also discuss a 'low-fermentation' diet to keep the bacteria from coming back.
